name: Anthropic

review.verdict: Best for strong reasoning and long context (200k tokens). Anthropic offers $20/mo (Pro), API $3/$15 per 1M tokens (Sonnet). Low vendor lock-in.
pros: strong reasoning and long context (200K tokens)
Low lock-in — easy to migrate away
cons: Need cheapest inference — DeepSeek is cheaper
Need image generation — OpenAI DALL-E or Stability
review.best_for: Need strong reasoning and long context (200K tokens)
